cards.name: Alchemize
cards.description: Procure a random potion.
cards.description_raw: Procure a random potion.

cards.name: Anointed
cards.description: Put every [gold]Rare[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Put every [gold]Rare[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Automation
cards.description: Every 10 cards you draw, gain [energy:1].
cards.description_raw: Every 10 cards you draw, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.

cards.name: Beacon of Hope
cards.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold].

cards.name: Beat Down
cards.description: Play 3 random Attacks from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Play {Cards:diff()} random Attacks from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Play 4 random Attacks from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

cards.name: Believe in You
cards.description: Another player gains [energy:2].
cards.description_raw: Another player gains {Energy:energyIcons()}.
cards.upgrade_description: Another player gains [energy:3].

cards.name: Bolas
cards.description:
Deal 3 damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 4 damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Calamity
cards.description: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Catastrophe
cards.description: Play 2 random cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Play {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Play 3 random cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

cards.name: Coordinate
cards.description: Give another player 5 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
cards.description_raw: Give another player {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
cards.upgrade_description: Give another player 8 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

cards.name: Dark Shackles
cards.description: Enemy loses 9 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
cards.description_raw: Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
cards.upgrade_description: Enemy loses 15 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

cards.name: Discovery
cards.description: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
cards.description_raw: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

cards.name: Dramatic Entrance
cards.description: Deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.
cards.description_raw: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
cards.upgrade_description: Deal 15 damage to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Entropy
cards.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Equilibrium
cards.description:
Gain 13 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
cards.description_raw:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
cards.upgrade_description:
Gain 16 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

cards.name: Eternal Armor
cards.description: Gain 9 [gold]Plating[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Gain 12 [gold]Plating[/gold].

cards.name: Fasten
cards.description: Gain an additional 5 [gold]Block[/gold] from Defend cards.
cards.description_raw: Gain an additional {ExtraBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] from Defend cards.
cards.upgrade_description: Gain an additional 7 [gold]Block[/gold] from Defend cards.

cards.name: Finesse
cards.description:
Gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
cards.description_raw:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
cards.upgrade_description:
Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Fisticuffs
cards.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 9 damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.

cards.name: Flash of Steel
cards.description:
Deal 5 damage.
Draw 1 card.
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 8 damage.
Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Gang Up
cards.description:
Deal 5 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for each time another player has attacked the enemy this turn.
cards.description_raw:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each time another player has attacked the enemy this turn.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 5 damage.
Deals 7 additional damage for each time another player has attacked the enemy this turn.

cards.name: Gold Axe
cards.description: Deal damage equal to the number of cards played this combat.
cards.description_raw:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards played this combat.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}

cards.name: Hand of Greed
cards.description:
Deal 20 damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain 20 [gold]Gold[/gold].
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 25 damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain 25 [gold]Gold[/gold].

cards.name: Hidden Gem
cards.description: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] 2.
cards.description_raw: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()}.
cards.upgrade_description: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] 3.

cards.name: Huddle Up
cards.description: ALL players draw 2 cards.
cards.description_raw: ALL players draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
cards.upgrade_description: ALL players draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Impatience
cards.description: If you have no Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold], draw 2 cards.
cards.description_raw: If you have no Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
cards.upgrade_description: If you have no Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold], draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Intercept
cards.description:
Gain 9 [gold]Block[/gold].
Redirect all incoming attacks that would be dealt to another player this turn to you.
cards.description_raw:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Redirect all incoming attacks that would be dealt to another player this turn to you.
cards.upgrade_description:
Gain 13 [gold]Block[/gold].
Redirect all incoming attacks that would be dealt to another player this turn to you.

cards.name: Jack of All Trades
cards.description: Add 1 random Colorless card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Add {Cards:diff()} random Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Add 2 random Colorless cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Jackpot
cards.description:
Deal 25 damage.
Add 3 random 0[energy:1] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add {Cards:diff()} random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]} 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 30 damage.
Add 3 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] 0[energy:1] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Knockdown
cards.description:
Deal 10 damage.
The enemy takes double damage from other players this turn.
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy takes {IfUpgraded:show:triple|double} damage from other players this turn.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 14 damage.
The enemy takes triple damage from other players this turn.

cards.name: Lift
cards.description: Give another player 11 [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Give another player {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Give another player 16 [gold]Block[/gold].

cards.name: Master of Strategy
cards.description: Draw 3 cards.
cards.description_raw: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
cards.upgrade_description: Draw 4 cards.

cards.name: Mayhem
cards.description: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.description_raw: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

cards.name: Mimic
cards.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the [gold]Block[/gold] on another player.
cards.description_raw: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the [gold]Block[/gold] on another player.

cards.name: Mind Blast
cards.description: Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
cards.description_raw:
Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}

cards.description_raw: The first Attack or Skill you play each turn is placed on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

cards.name: Omnislice
cards.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Damage ALL other enemies equal to the damage dealt.
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Damage ALL other enemies equal to the damage dealt.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 11 damage.
Damage ALL other enemies equal to the damage dealt.

cards.name: Panache
cards.description: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.
cards.description_raw: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal {PanacheDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
cards.upgrade_description: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal 14 damage to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Panic Button
cards.description:
Gain 30 [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for 2 turns.
cards.description_raw:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for {Turns:diff()} {Turns:plural:turn|turns}.
cards.upgrade_description:
Gain 40 [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for 2 turns.

cards.description: At the start of your turn, gain 4 [gold]Vigor[/gold].

cards.upgrade_description: At the start of your turn, gain 6 [gold]Vigor[/gold].

cards.name: Production
cards.description: Gain [energy:2].
cards.description_raw: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
cards.upgrade_description: Gain [energy:3].

cards.name: Prolong
cards.description: Next turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Next turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold].

Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain 2 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

cards.description: Exhaust up to 3 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Exhaust up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Exhaust up to 5 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.description: ALL players gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.description_raw: ALL players gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: ALL players gain 17 [gold]Block[/gold].

cards.name: Rend
cards.description:
Deal 15 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.

Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.
cards.upgrade_description:

Deals 8 additional damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.

cards.name: Restlessness
cards.description: If your [gold]Hand[/gold] is empty, draw 2 cards and gain [energy:2].

cards.upgrade_description: If your [gold]Hand[/gold] is empty, draw 3 cards and gain [energy:3].

cards.description: At the start of your turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by 5.

cards.upgrade_description: At the start of your turn, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by 5.

cards.description: Put a Skill from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Put a Skill from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.description: Put an Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Put an Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.upgrade_description: Apply 5 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Splash
cards.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attacks from another character to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

cards.description_raw: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose a card from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

cards.name: Tag Team
